zh.lifeSummary: 當Helen de Dunbar於1160年出生在英國蘇格蘭易亞斯特 洛迪安鄧巴時，她的父親Waltheof 3rd Earl of Dunbar38歲，母親Aline MacCrinan of Dunbar31歲。她於大約1180年與Alexander de Seaton在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於1200年在英國蘇格蘭米德洛迪安洛斯林享年40歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Helen de Dunbar于1160年出生在英国苏格兰易亞斯特 洛迪安鄧巴时，她的父亲Waltheof 3rd Earl of Dunbar38岁，母亲Aline MacCrinan of Dunbar31岁。她于大约1180年与Alexander de Seaton在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。她去世于1200年在英国苏格兰米德洛迪安洛斯林享年40岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Dunbar
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Dunbar, a place on the North Sea coast near Edinburgh, named with Gaelic dùn ‘fort’ + barr ‘top, summit’.

History: A family of this name were granted the lands of Dunbar by Malcolm III (1058–1093), and later acquired the earldoms of Dunbar and March. These earldoms were then withdrawn from the family by James I in 1434.

nameMeanings.name: Helen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: vernacular form of the name (Greek Hēlēnē) borne in classical legend by a famous beauty, wife of Menelaus, whose seizure by the Trojan prince Paris sparked off the Trojan War. Her name is of uncertain origin; it may be connected with a word meaning ‘ray’ or ‘sunbeam’ compare Greek hēlios ‘sun’. It has sometimes been taken as connected with the Greek word meaning ‘Greek’, Hellēn, but this is doubtful. In the early Christian period the name was borne by the mother of the Emperor Constantine, who is now usually known by the Latin version of her name, Helena. She is credited with having found the True Cross in Jerusalem. She was born in about 248 , probably in Bithynia. However, in medieval England it was believed that she had been born in Britain, which greatly increased the popularity of the name there.

en.lifeSummary: When Helen de Dunbar was born in 1160, in Dunbar, East Lothian, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, Waltheof 3rd Earl of Dunbar, was 38 and her mother, Aline MacCrinan of Dunbar, was 31. She married Alexander de Seaton about 1180, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died in 1200, in Roslin, Midlothian, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 40.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Helen de Dunbar est née en 1160, à Dunbar, East Lothian, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Waltheof 3rd Earl of Dunbar, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Aline MacCrinan of Dunbar, avait 31 ans. Elle a épousé Alexander de Seaton environ 1180, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1200, à Roslin, Midlothian, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 40 ans.

de.Dunbar, Lothian, Scotland: Dunbar, East Lothian, Schottland, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Helen de Dunbar 1160 in Dunbar, East Lothian, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Waltheof 3rd Earl of Dunbar 38 und ihre Mutter Aline MacCrinan of Dunbar 31. Sie hat um 1180 in England, United Kingdom Alexander de Seaton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1200 im Alter von 40 Jahren in Roslin, Midlothian, Schottland, United Kingdom.

Lei sposato Alexander de Seaton circa 1180, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì nel 1200, nel Roslin, Midlothian, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 40 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Helen de Dunbarが1160年にイギリススコットランドエアスト ロスアンダンバーで生まれた時，父Waltheof 3rd Earl of Dunbarは38歳，母Aline MacCrinan of Dunbarは31歳であった。約1180年にイギリスイギリスでAlexander de Seatonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1200年にイギリススコットランドミドロスアンロスリンで40歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Helen de Dunbar(이)가 1160년 영국 스코틀랜드 이스트 로스이언 던바에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Waltheof 3rd Earl of Dunbar(은)는 38세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Aline MacCrinan of Dunbar(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 대략 1180년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Alexander de Seaton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1200년 영국 스코틀랜드 미들로스이언 로슬린에서 40세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ela casou-se com Alexander de Seaton aproximadamente 1180, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Helen de Dunbar родилась в 1160 г. в местности дунбар, эаст лотян, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Waltheof 3rd Earl of Dunbar было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Aline MacCrinan of Dunbar, 31. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Alexander de Seaton около 1180 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1200 г. в местности рослинь, мидлотян, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 40 лет.
